name: clawd-app
description: Claw'd App - All-in-one desktop app: clawd-chat server + UI + worker manager

scripts.build: bun run build:ui && mkdir -p dist && bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun --outfile dist/clawd-app && rm -rf dist/ui && cp -r ../clawd-chat/packages/ui/dist dist/ui
scripts.build:linux: bun run build:ui && mkdir -p dist && bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/clawd-app-linux-x64 && rm -rf dist/ui && cp -r ../clawd-chat/packages/ui/dist dist/ui
scripts.build:macos: bun run build:ui && mkdir -p dist && bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/clawd-app-darwin-arm64 && rm -rf dist/ui && cp -r ../clawd-chat/packages/ui/dist dist/ui
scripts.install:local: mkdir -p ~/.clawd/bin && cp dist/clawd-app ~/.clawd/bin/ && rm -rf ~/.clawd/bin/app-ui && cp -r dist/ui ~/.clawd/bin/app-ui
